message: feat: add pre-compact.sh and notification.sh hooks

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# notification.sh — Notification hook (async)
+# Records an info SystemMessage when Claude Code sends a notification.
+#
+# PAYLOAD FIELDS: Verify against a live session. Expected: session_id, message or notification or title.
+set -euo pipefail
+
+source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib.sh"
+resolve_cxdb_url
+
+input=$(cat)
+session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id')
+context_id=$(get_context_id "$session_id")
+[ -z "$context_id" ] && exit 0
+
+# Try common field names for notification text (verify with probe)
+notification_text=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.message // .notification // .title // "Notification"')
+ts=$(now_ms)
+
+payload=$(jq -n \
+  --arg content "$notification_text" \
+  --argjson ts "$ts" \
+  '{
+    "type_id": "cxdb.ConversationItem",
+    "type_version": 3,
+    "data": {
+      "item_type": "system",
+      "status": "complete",
+      "timestamp": $ts,
+      "system": {
+        "kind": "info",
+        "title": "Notification",
+        "content": $content
+      }
+    }
+  }')
+
+cxdb_append "$context_id" "$payload"
+exit 0

@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# pre-compact.sh — PreCompact hook (async)
+# Records a warning SystemMessage when context is about to be compacted.
+set -euo pipefail
+
+source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib.sh"
+resolve_cxdb_url
+
+input=$(cat)
+session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id')
+context_id=$(get_context_id "$session_id")
+[ -z "$context_id" ] && exit 0
+
+ts=$(now_ms)
+
+payload=$(jq -n \
+  --argjson ts "$ts" \
+  '{
+    "type_id": "cxdb.ConversationItem",
+    "type_version": 3,
+    "data": {
+      "item_type": "system",
+      "status": "complete",
+      "timestamp": $ts,
+      "system": {
+        "kind": "warning",
+        "title": "Context Compacted",
+        "content": "Context window compacted to fit within limits"
+      }
+    }
+  }')
+
+cxdb_append "$context_id" "$payload"
+exit 0
